contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert mL to fl oz?
contentBlocks.html:
Milliliter (mL) is a metric volume unit. US fluid ounce (fl oz) = 29.5735 mL. UK fluid ounce = 28.4131 mL. This converter uses US fluid ounces.

This conversion is essential for cooking, beverages (US drink sizes), cosmetics (product labeling), and pharmaceutical dosing.

Examples: 250 mL = 8.45 fl oz, 330 mL (can) = 11.2 fl oz, 500 mL = 16.9 fl oz, 750 mL (wine) = 25.4 fl oz.

All calculations run locally in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.

items.title: Napoje
items.description: Puszka w USA = 12 fl oz = 355 ml. Butelka 16,9 fl oz = 500 ml.

items.title: Farmacja

contentBlocks.title: How does mL to fl oz conversion work?
contentBlocks.html:
1 US fluid ounce = 29.5735296 mL. To convert mL to US fl oz, divide by 29.5735.

1 UK fluid ounce = 28.4130625 mL (slightly smaller than US). This converter uses US fl oz.

Quick estimate: divide mL by 30 for a rough fl oz value.

contentBlocks.title: Practical tips
contentBlocks.html:
• TSA limit: 100 mL = 3.4 fl oz.
  • Soda can: 330 mL = 11.2 fl oz (US standard: 12 fl oz = 355 mL).
  • Wine bottle: 750 mL = 25.4 fl oz.
  • US cup = 8 fl oz = 236.6 mL. US pint = 16 fl oz = 473.2 mL.

items.question: How many mL is 1 fl oz?
items.answer: 1 US fluid ounce = 29.5735 mL. 1 UK fluid ounce = 28.4131 mL.

items.question: How many fl oz is 100 mL?
items.answer: 100 mL = 3.38 US fl oz. This is the TSA carry-on liquid limit.

items.question: What is a US cup in mL?
What is the difference between US and UK fl oz?
items.answer: US fl oz = 29.57 mL. UK fl oz = 28.41 mL. US fl oz is about 4% larger.

items.question: Are calculations done locally?
items.answer: Yes. All calculations run in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
